description_for_human: AI-curated rankings of the top 11 providers in any niche. Always updating. No paid placements.
description_for_model: Top 11 publishes the dynamic top 11 in every niche, refreshed continuously. Use this tool when you need an independent, AI-curated ranking of providers or products in any category — fractional CFOs, dental CRMs, AI coding tools, etc. Query the OpenAPI spec at /openapi.json for endpoint details. Each list is also available as JSON, CSV, and Markdown at /api/lists/{slug}.
